title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services!
